title: Magical Psi: Revival
description: Magical Psi Revival replaces every asset and description of Psi with a magic-themed counterpart.
body:
![Magical Psi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d9d3c995d243865dcb38a9cdf852c10ae9b9a05_0.webp)

Magical Psi: Revival replaces every asset and description of Psi with a magic-themed counterpart. This mod should be used both client-side and server-side due to the recipe changes to ensure thematic consistency. However, this mod can also be used client-side only if needed. This is a remake of the remake [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/magical-psi-redux](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/magical-psi-redux) by [https://github.com/TheIllusiveC4](https://github.com/TheIllusiveC4), distributed under the [https://psi.vazkii.net/license.php](https://psi.vazkii.net/license.php).

Requires both [https://modrinth.com/mod/psi](https://modrinth.com/mod/psi) and its dependency [https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli).

## Features
### Blocks and Items
![Blocks and Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DvvYZ4Cd/images/5f1198bd9ecf244cb0500ab7586ea3a33512ecbf.webp)
### Focusing Rods
![Focusing Rods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DvvYZ4Cd/images/91fa236413012c59ff0363df180c1b66a1d16fc7.webp)
### Focusing Plate Armor
![Focusing Plate Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DvvYZ4Cd/images/936c18bd9b1fee45beddc63c3e1d1125337914f3.webp)
